id - ID
itemType - String
itemId - Int
parentType - String
parentId - Int
active - Boolean
deletedAt - Date
createdAt - Date!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "itemType": "xyz789",
  "itemId": 987,
  "parentType": "xyz789",
  "parentId": 123,
  "active": false,
  "deletedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

CourseItemView

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String!
type - String!
createdAt - Date!
userVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - [CreditsAssignedValues]
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "name": "abc123",
  "type": "xyz789",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "userVisitsCount": 123,
  "credits": [CreditsAssignedValues]
}
Types

CourseItemViewReport

Fields
Field Name Description
courseId - ID! The Course Id
itemViews - [CourseItemView]! The item views associated with the course
Example
{"courseId": 4, "itemViews": [CourseItemView]}
Types

CoursePresentation

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Presentation Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Presentation
name - String! The Presentation name
userVisitsCount - Int! The number of visits to the Presentation by users with details within the StartDate - EndDate range. This excludes the users that are not allowed for the account
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
playCount - Int! The number of times the audio or video for the presenation was played
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
hoursWatched - Float! The total hours the audio or video for the presenation was played
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
teamId - Int The Team Id for the team that is associated to the Presentation data
courseId - Int The Id of the Course the Presentation belongs to
parentCourseSection - String! The Course Section name associated to the Presentation
userVisits - [UserView]! The sub report of the visits to the Presentation by users with details within the StartDate - EndDate range
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
totalVisitsCount - Int! The number of visits to the Presentation by users with details within the StartDate - EndDate range
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - String The credits used to access this Course Presentation
status - String! The status of the Course Presentation (active/inactive)
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 987,
  "name": "xyz789",
  "userVisitsCount": 987,
  "playCount": 987,
  "hoursWatched": 123.45,
  "teamId": 123,
  "courseId": 987,
  "parentCourseSection": "abc123",
  "userVisits": [UserView],
  "totalVisitsCount": 987,
  "credits": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123"
}
Types

CourseUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
courseProgressCompletion - Int
courseItemViewsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
courseItemViewsDetail - [UserCourseItemView]
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
courseUserCertificate - UserCertificate
courseStartDate - Date
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 123,
  "courseProgressCompletion": 987,
  "courseItemViewsCount": 123,
  "courseItemViewsDetail": [UserCourseItemView],
  "courseUserCertificate": UserCertificate,
  "courseStartDate": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

CourseUserVisits

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
courseId - Int!
details - [CourseUser]
Arguments
userIds - [Int!]
uid - String
startDate - Date
endDate - Date
limit - Int
offset - Int
Example
{"id": 4, "courseId": 123, "details": [CourseUser]}
Types

CreditTypeForCompletedValue

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the CreditTypeForCompletedValue
name - String! The name of the CreditTypeForCompletedValue
active - Boolean! The state of the CreditTypeForCompletedValue. True for active / False for inactive
creditsCompletedValues - [CreditsCompletedValue]! The sub report of the Credits Completed with details
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "active": true,
  "creditsCompletedValues": [CreditsCompletedValue]
}
Types

CreditTypeForCreditCertified

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the CreditTypeForCreditCertified
name - String! The name of the CreditTypeForCreditCertified
active - Boolean! The state of the CreditTypeForCreditCertified. True for active / False for inactive
creditsCertifiedValues - Float The value of the CreditTypeForCreditCertified
creditsCertifiedDetails - [CreditsCertifiedValues] The sub report of the Certified Credits with details
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "active": true,
  "creditsCertifiedValues": 987.65,
  "creditsCertifiedDetails": [CreditsCertifiedValues]
}
Types

CreditsAssignedValues

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the CreditAssignedValue
value - String! The value of the CreditAssignedValue
type - String! The type of the CreditAssignedValue
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "value": "abc123",
  "type": "abc123"
}
Types

CreditsCertifiedValues

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the CreditsCertifiedValue
value - Float The value of the CreditsCertifiedValue
userCertificate - UserCertificate The associated Certificate with user info
type - String The type of the CreditsCertifiedValue
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "value": 123.45,
  "userCertificate": UserCertificate,
  "type": "xyz789"
}
Types

CreditsCompletedUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
creditTypesForCompletedValues - [CreditTypeForCompletedValue]! The sub report of CreditTypes for CompletedCredits with user information within the startDate - endDate range
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 987,
  "creditTypesForCompletedValues": [
    CreditTypeForCompletedValue
  ]
}
Types

CreditsCompletedValue

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the CreditCompleted
value - Float! The value of the CreditCompleted
Example
{"id": "4", "value": 123.45}
Types

Currency

Description

Currency custom scalar type

Example
"USD"
Types

Date

Description

Date custom scalar type

Example
"2007-12-03"
Types

Discount

Fields
Field Name Description
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Coupon associated with the discount
amount - String! The amount that was reduced with the discount
details - [OrderDiscount] The sub report with details about the order associated with the discount
endDate - Date The end date of the Coupon associated with the discount
id - ID! The Id of the Coupon associated with the discount
name - String The name of the Coupon associated with the discount
percentage - Boolean! The percentage of the discount applied. Associated to the Coupon
times - Int The times the Coupon was used
type - String The Coupon type
status - String! The Coupon status. Could be Archived, Active or Inactive
updatedAt - Date The date the Coupon was updated
used - Int The number of times the Coupon was used within different orders
Example
{
  "accountId": 987,
  "amount": "abc123",
  "details": [OrderDiscount],
  "endDate": "2007-12-03",
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "percentage": true,
  "times": 987,
  "type": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "used": 987
}
Types

Event

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
accountId - Int!
teamId - Int
archivedAt - Date
createdAt - Date!
deletedAt - Date
endedOn - Date
name - String!
presentationAmount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean!
presentations - [EventPresentation]
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean!
startedOn - Date
status - String!
userVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean!
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
userVisitsDetail - [EventUser]!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean!
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 123,
  "teamId": 987,
  "archivedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "deletedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "endedOn": "2007-12-03",
  "name": "xyz789",
  "presentationAmount": 123,
  "presentations": [EventPresentation],
  "startedOn": "2007-12-03",
  "status": "xyz789",
  "userVisitsCount": 123,
  "userVisitsDetail": [EventUser]
}
Types

EventPresentation

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String!
parentEventSection - String!
userVisits - [UserView]!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
userVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
totalVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
playCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
hoursWatched - Float!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
status - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "parentEventSection": "xyz789",
  "userVisits": [UserView],
  "userVisitsCount": 123,
  "totalVisitsCount": 123,
  "playCount": 987,
  "hoursWatched": 123.45,
  "status": "xyz789"
}
Types

EventUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
eventItemViews - Int
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 987,
  "eventItemViews": 123
}
Types

ExternalActivity

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Id of the external activity
accountId - Int! The accountId of the associated account for external activities
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
itemType - String! The type of the associated item (i.e. Document, Webinar, Survey, etc.)
date - Date! The date the External Activity was issued
url - String The url of the External Activity
description - String The description of the External Activity
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "accountId": 123,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "itemType": "xyz789",
  "date": "2007-12-03",
  "url": "abc123",
  "description": "xyz789"
}
Types

Float

Description

The Float scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by IEEE 754.

Example
123.45
Types

Group

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String
Example
{"id": 4, "name": "xyz789"}
Types

GuestUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String!
duration - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "duration": "abc123"
}
Types

ID

Description

The ID scalar type represents a unique identifier, often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID type appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as "4") or integer (such as 4) input value will be accepted as an ID.

Example
"4"
Types

InPersonEvent

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
accountId - Int!
attendeesCount - Int!
attendeesDetails - [InPersonEventUser]
Arguments
userIds - [Int!]
uid - String
cancellations - [InPersonEventCancellation]
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
cancellationsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - [CreditsAssignedValues]
endDate - String!
endTime - String!
formattedCredits - [String!]
location - String!
name - String!
maxRegistrations - Int
registrantsCount - Int!
registrantDetails - [InPersonEventRegistrationUser]
Arguments
userIds - [Int!]
uid - String
startDate - String!
startTime - String!
status - String
timeZone - String
totalVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
userVisitsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "accountId": 123,
  "attendeesCount": 987,
  "attendeesDetails": [InPersonEventUser],
  "cancellations": [InPersonEventCancellation],
  "cancellationsCount": 123,
  "credits": [CreditsAssignedValues],
  "endDate": "xyz789",
  "endTime": "xyz789",
  "formattedCredits": ["abc123"],
  "location": "xyz789",
  "name": "xyz789",
  "maxRegistrations": 123,
  "registrantsCount": 987,
  "registrantDetails": [InPersonEventRegistrationUser],
  "startDate": "xyz789",
  "startTime": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "totalVisitsCount": 987,
  "userVisitsCount": 987
}
Types

InPersonEventCancellation

Fields
Field Name Description
cancellationDate - Date
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
Example
{
  "cancellationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer]
}
Types

InPersonEventRegistrationUser

Fields
Field Name Description
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date
Example
{
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

InPersonEventUser

Fields
Field Name Description
completedAt - Date
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date
Example
{
  "completedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

Int

Description

The Int scalar type represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.

Example
123
Types

ItemVisit

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
visitedAt - Date!
archivedAt - Date
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "visitedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "archivedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

JSON

Example
{}
Types

Metadata

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! MetadataTemplate Id
metadatableType - String! Type of the item the metadata is assigned to
metadatableId - Int! ID of the item the metadata is assigned to
metadataTemplate - MetadataTemplate! Metadata Template
key - String! key
value - JSON! value
valueString - String! value as a string
payload - JSON! value payload
payloadString - String! value payload as a string
createdAt - Date date created
updatedAt - Date date updated
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "metadatableType": "abc123",
  "metadatableId": 987,
  "metadataTemplate": MetadataTemplate,
  "key": "xyz789",
  "value": {},
  "valueString": "abc123",
  "payload": {},
  "payloadString": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

MetadataLabel

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123"
}
Types

MetadataTemplate

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! MetadataTemplate Id
accountId - ID! The Account Id for the account that owns the course
valueType - String! value type (string date time date_time boolean list float integer event_rollup compound html, etc.)
key - String! key
objectKey - String object key for event rollup
timeZone - String time zone for date time value types
external - Boolean external or internal field
allowNullValues - Boolean Are null values allowed
createdAt - Date date created
updatedAt - Date date updated
metadata - [Metadata]
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "accountId": "4",
  "valueType": "xyz789",
  "key": "xyz789",
  "objectKey": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "external": false,
  "allowNullValues": false,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "metadata": [Metadata]
}
Types

MetadataValue

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
value - String
metadataLabel - MetadataLabel
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "value": "abc123",
  "metadataLabel": MetadataLabel
}
Types

Order

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int! The Order Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Order
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
couponCode - [String]! The list of coupon codes used for the Order
creditsUsed - Float! The total amount of credits used for the Order
date - Date! The date the Order was created
discountAndCredits - Float! The total amount of discounts and credits used for the Order
invoiced - Boolean! The invoiced status of the Order
itemCount - Int! The total items within the order
manual - Boolean! True if the Order is manual
notes - String! The Order notes
orderItemDetails - [OrderItem] The sub report of the item details within the Order
originalPrice - Float! The original price without discounts or credits used for the order
paid - Boolean! The payment status of the order
paymentDetails - [String]! The sub report of payment details the Order has
priceLabels - String The Order price labels
pricePaid - Float The total price paid by the User
refundTotal - Float If refunded, the total refunded to the User
Example
{
  "id": 123,
  "accountId": 987,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "couponCode": ["xyz789"],
  "creditsUsed": 123.45,
  "date": "2007-12-03",
  "discountAndCredits": 123.45,
  "invoiced": true,
  "itemCount": 987,
  "manual": false,
  "notes": "abc123",
  "orderItemDetails": [OrderItem],
  "originalPrice": 123.45,
  "paid": false,
  "paymentDetails": ["xyz789"],
  "priceLabels": "abc123",
  "pricePaid": 987.65,
  "refundTotal": 123.45
}
Types

OrderDiscount

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int!
orderId - Int
order - Order!
Example
{"id": 123, "orderId": 987, "order": Order}
Types

OrderItem

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int! The OrderItem Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the OrderItem
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
couponCodes - [String]! The coupon codes used for the Order
creditsUsed - Float! The total credits used for the Order
currency - String! The currency of the Order
date - Date! The Order issue date
discount - Float! The discount applied to the Order
itemName - String The name of the purchased Item
notes - String The notes of the Order
order - Order! The associated Order details
orderNum - Int! The Order number
originalPrice - Float! The Order original price
paymentDetails - [String]! The Payment details of the Order
priceGroup - String! The Order price group
priceLabel - String! The Order Price Label
pricePaid - Float! The value paid for the Item within the Order
productId - Int The product Id
productType - String The product Type
refund - Refund The total refunded for the Item
revoked - Boolean! The revoked status of the Item
revokedAt - Date The date the Item was revoked
revokedBy - User The user that revoked the Item
revokeNote - String! The notes to support the revoke
Example
{
  "id": 123,
  "accountId": 987,
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "couponCodes": ["xyz789"],
  "creditsUsed": 987.65,
  "currency": "xyz789",
  "date": "2007-12-03",
  "discount": 123.45,
  "itemName": "xyz789",
  "notes": "abc123",
  "order": Order,
  "orderNum": 987,
  "originalPrice": 987.65,
  "paymentDetails": ["abc123"],
  "priceGroup": "xyz789",
  "priceLabel": "xyz789",
  "pricePaid": 987.65,
  "productId": 123,
  "productType": "xyz789",
  "refund": Refund,
  "revoked": false,
  "revokedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "revokedBy": User,
  "revokeNote": "abc123"
}
Types

ProductCatalog

Fields
Field Name Description
sellableApiId - Int! The id of the Sellable Item (Product)
price - Float The price of the Sellable Item
priceLabel - String The price label of the Sellable Item
expiration - Date The time the Sellable Item expires at
accountId - Int! The account this Sellable Item belongs to
purchasableUntil - String The time the availability expires
parentCourseSection - String The Course or Section this Sellable Item belongs to
active - Boolean! The state of the Sellable Item. True for active
productId - Int! The Id of the Product this Sellable Item belongs to
productType - String! The type of the Product this Sellable Item belongs to (i.e. Section, Event, Course, etc.)
productName - String! The name of the Product this Sellable Item belongs to
realProductType - String! The type of the Product this Sellable Item belongs to (i.e. Section, Event, Course, etc.)
priceName - String The name of the price when the account has the Group Pricing feature enabled
externalProductId - String The Id of the external product if the account allows external product mapping
Example
{
  "sellableApiId": 987,
  "price": 123.45,
  "priceLabel": "xyz789",
  "expiration": "2007-12-03",
  "accountId": 123,
  "purchasableUntil": "abc123",
  "parentCourseSection": "xyz789",
  "active": false,
  "productId": 987,
  "productType": "abc123",
  "productName": "xyz789",
  "realProductType": "abc123",
  "priceName": "abc123",
  "externalProductId": "abc123"
}
Types

Refund

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int! The Refund Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Refund
amount - Float! The Refund total amount
note - String! The Refund notes
user - User The Refund User with details
Example
{
  "id": 987,
  "accountId": 987,
  "amount": 123.45,
  "note": "abc123",
  "user": User
}
Types

RefundOrder

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int! The Id of the associated Order
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Order
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
amount - Currency! The amount refunded
dateRefunded - Date! The date the Refund was issued
itemCount - Int! The number of items included in the Refund
order - Order! The associated Order with details
orderNum - Int! The associated Order number
refundDetails - String! The Refund transaction details
refundNotes - String! The Refund notes
Example
{
  "id": 123,
  "accountId": 123,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "amount": "USD",
  "dateRefunded": "2007-12-03",
  "itemCount": 987,
  "order": Order,
  "orderNum": 123,
  "refundDetails": "xyz789",
  "refundNotes": "xyz789"
}
Types

RefundOrderItem

Fields
Field Name Description
id - Int!
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
datePurchased - Date!
dateRefunded - Date!
dateRevoked - Date
amount - Float
refundedBy - SimpleUser!
revokedBy - SimpleUser
refundDetails - String!
refundNotes - String
itemName - String!
order - Order!
priceLabels - String!
paymentDetails - [String]!
Example
{
  "id": 123,
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "datePurchased": "2007-12-03",
  "dateRefunded": "2007-12-03",
  "dateRevoked": "2007-12-03",
  "amount": 987.65,
  "refundedBy": SimpleUser,
  "revokedBy": SimpleUser,
  "refundDetails": "xyz789",
  "refundNotes": "abc123",
  "itemName": "abc123",
  "order": Order,
  "priceLabels": "abc123",
  "paymentDetails": ["xyz789"]
}
Types

SaleByBundle

Fields
Field Name Description
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Bundle
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
orderNum - Int The Order identifier
itemType - String! The Item type. Could be Course, Section, Presentation, etc.
itemName - String! The Item name
bundleName - String The Bundle name
status - String! The Bundle status. Could be Archive, Active or Inactive
presentedOn - Date The date on user's Time Zone the Item was presented to the user
datePurchased - Date The date the Bundle was purchased
originalPrice - Float The Original price of the Bundle
discount - Float The total discount price applied to the Bundle
price - Float The total price paid for the Bundle
coupons - [String]! The list of coupon names used
physician - Boolean
bundledSales - [SaleByBundle] The sub report with each bundle sale with details
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
Example
{
  "accountId": 123,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "orderNum": 123,
  "itemType": "abc123",
  "itemName": "abc123",
  "bundleName": "xyz789",
  "status": "abc123",
  "presentedOn": "2007-12-03",
  "datePurchased": "2007-12-03",
  "originalPrice": 987.65,
  "discount": 987.65,
  "price": 123.45,
  "coupons": ["abc123"],
  "physician": false,
  "bundledSales": [SaleByBundle]
}
Types

SaleByCategory

Fields
Field Name Description
name - String! The Category Name
sales - Int! The amount of sales
total - Int! The sales total
revenue - Float! The revenue of the sales for the Category
salesReport - [CategorySale]! The sub report with all the details of the sale for the Category
Example
{
  "name": "abc123",
  "sales": 123,
  "total": 987,
  "revenue": 123.45,
  "salesReport": [CategorySale]
}
Types

Scorm

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
accountId - Int!
teamId - Int
courseId - Int
name - String
userVisitsTotal - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
userVisits - [ScormUser]!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - [CreditsAssignedValues]!
formattedCredits - [String!]
active - String
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "accountId": 123,
  "teamId": 987,
  "courseId": 123,
  "name": "xyz789",
  "userVisitsTotal": 123,
  "userVisits": [ScormUser],
  "credits": [CreditsAssignedValues],
  "formattedCredits": ["xyz789"],
  "active": "xyz789"
}
Types

ScormUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
firstViewed - Date!
dateCompleted - Date
itemViewsCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
percentCompleted - Int!
scormId - Int!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "firstViewed": "2007-12-03",
  "dateCompleted": "2007-12-03",
  "itemViewsCount": 123,
  "percentCompleted": 123,
  "scormId": 987
}
Types

SimpleUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
admin - Boolean!
createdAt - Date!
physician - Boolean
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 987,
  "admin": false,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "physician": true
}
Types

String

Description

The String scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.

Example
"abc123"
Types

Survey

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Survey Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id the Survey belongs to
courseId - Int The Id of the Course the Survey belongs to
name - String! The name of the Survey
parentCourseSection - String! The parent section the Survey belongs to
createdAt - Date! The Date the survey was created
userVisitsTotal - Int! The number of visits to the Survey by users with details within the StartDate - EndDate range. This excludes the users that are not allowed for the account
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - String The credits used to access the Survey
status - String! The Survey status (active/inactive)
questionsCount - Int! The number of questions for the survey
submissionCount - Int! The number submissions for the Survey by users within the StartDate - EndDate range.
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
selfAttestationEnabled - Boolean! is the Self Attestation enabled for this Survey
completions - [SurveyCompletion]! The sub report of survey completions. It includes user information
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
summativeInfo - SurveySummativeInfo! The sub report of Summative details about the Survey
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 987,
  "courseId": 123,
  "name": "abc123",
  "parentCourseSection": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "userVisitsTotal": 987,
  "credits": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123",
  "questionsCount": 123,
  "submissionCount": 123,
  "selfAttestationEnabled": false,
  "completions": [SurveyCompletion],
  "summativeInfo": SurveySummativeInfo
}
Types

SurveyCompletion

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
createdAt - Date!
percentAnswered - Int
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
answers - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "percentAnswered": 987,
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "answers": [SurveyQuestionAnswer]
}
Types

SurveyMatrixQuestion

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
questionText - String!
rows - [SurveyMatrixQuestionRow]!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "questionText": "abc123",
  "rows": [SurveyMatrixQuestionRow]
}
Types

SurveyMatrixQuestionColumn

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
text - String!
weight - Int!
amount - Int!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "text": "xyz789",
  "weight": 123,
  "amount": 987
}
Types

SurveyMatrixQuestionRow

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
text - String!
average - Float!
columns - [SurveyMatrixQuestionColumn]!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "text": "abc123",
  "average": 987.65,
  "columns": [SurveyMatrixQuestionColumn]
}
Types

SurveyMultipleChoiceQuestion

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
questionText - String!
answersAmount - Int!
choices - [SurveyQuestionChoice]!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "questionText": "xyz789",
  "answersAmount": 123,
  "choices": [SurveyQuestionChoice]
}
Types

SurveyOpenEndedQuestion

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
questionText - String!
answersAmount - Int!
answers - [String]!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "questionText": "xyz789",
  "answersAmount": 987,
  "answers": ["xyz789"]
}
Types

SurveyQuestionAnswer

Fields
Field Name Description
questionText - String!
answerText - String!
Example
{
  "questionText": "xyz789",
  "answerText": "abc123"
}
Types

SurveyQuestionChoice

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
text - String!
answersAmount - Int!
answersPercentage - Float!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "text": "xyz789",
  "answersAmount": 987,
  "answersPercentage": 987.65
}
Types

SurveySummativeInfo

Fields
Field Name Description
openEndedQuestions - [SurveyOpenEndedQuestion]
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
matrixQuestions - [SurveyMatrixQuestion]
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
multipleChoiceQuestions - [SurveyMultipleChoiceQuestion]
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
Example
{
  "openEndedQuestions": [SurveyOpenEndedQuestion],
  "matrixQuestions": [SurveyMatrixQuestion],
  "multipleChoiceQuestions": [
    SurveyMultipleChoiceQuestion
  ]
}
Types

Team

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String!
assessmentsReport - [Assessment]! This report will give you a high level overview of Assessments within a Course
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
assignmentsReport - [Assignment]! This report will give you a high level overview of Assignments within a Course.
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
certificatesReport - [Certificate]! This report will give you a high level overview of Certificates within a Course.
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
certifiedCreditsReport - [CertifiedCredit]! This report will give you a high level overview of credits which are tied to an earned certificate. Users who have earned credits which are tied to an earned certificate are included in this report.
Arguments
userIds - [Int]
uid - String
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
noPagination - String
courses - [Course]! This report displays the total number of courses available. Each row contains detailed information about the available courses.
Arguments
metadataTemplateId - Int
withArchived - Boolean
offset - Int
limit - Int
coursePresentations - [CoursePresentation]! This report includes content and user activity for presentations included within courses across your site
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
creditsCompletedReport - [CreditsCompletedUser]! This report will give you a high level overview of credits earned for items completed, regardless of whether the user earned a certificate
Arguments
offset - Int
limit - Int
events - [Event]! This report will give you a high level overview of data for all On-demand Events on your account. Each row contains content, visit, and status information for each event.
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
offset - Int
limit - Int
inPersonEventsReport - [InPersonEvent]! This report will give you a high level overview of all data pertaining to your in-person (or on-site) event objects in Path.
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
pastEvents - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
liveWebEventsReport - [Webinar]! This report will give you a high level overview of web events on Path
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
pastEvents - Boolean
offset - Int
limit - Int
scormReport - [Scorm]! This report contains a list of all SCORM content and general user engagement metrics, such as date first viewed, date completed, and item visits
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
offset - Int
limit - Int
surveysReport - [Survey]! This report will give you a high level overview of survey data within a course.
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
offset - Int
limit - Int
users - [User]! This report will give you a high level overview of user information regarding work completed over the given start/end dates inputted.
Arguments
userIds - [Int]
uid - String
offset - Int
limit - Int
assessmentsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
assignmentsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
certificatesTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
certifiedCreditsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
coursesTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
coursePresentationsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
eventsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
inPersonEventsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
pastEvents - Boolean
liveWebEventsTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
pastEvents - Boolean
scormTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
surveysTotalCount - Int!
Arguments
withArchived - Boolean
usersTotalCount - Int!
account - BaseAccount! This field allows you to query common account information for the team you are running the report against
creditsCompletedTotalCount - Int!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "name": "abc123",
  "assessmentsReport": [Assessment],
  "assignmentsReport": [Assignment],
  "certificatesReport": [Certificate],
  "certifiedCreditsReport": [CertifiedCredit],
  "courses": [Course],
  "coursePresentations": [CoursePresentation],
  "creditsCompletedReport": [CreditsCompletedUser],
  "events": [Event],
  "inPersonEventsReport": [InPersonEvent],
  "liveWebEventsReport": [Webinar],
  "scormReport": [Scorm],
  "surveysReport": [Survey],
  "users": [User],
  "assessmentsTotalCount": 123,
  "assignmentsTotalCount": 123,
  "certificatesTotalCount": 123,
  "certifiedCreditsTotalCount": 123,
  "coursesTotalCount": 123,
  "coursePresentationsTotalCount": 123,
  "eventsTotalCount": 987,
  "inPersonEventsTotalCount": 987,
  "liveWebEventsTotalCount": 987,
  "scormTotalCount": 123,
  "surveysTotalCount": 987,
  "usersTotalCount": 987,
  "account": BaseAccount,
  "creditsCompletedTotalCount": 123
}
Types

User

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
accountId - Int!
admin - Boolean!
assessmentPassedCount - Int! The total number of assessments passed between the date range of startDate and endDate for a user.
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
assessmentFailedCount - Int! The total number of assessments failed between the date range of startDate and endDate for a user.
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
completions - [Completion]!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
certificatesEarnedCount - Int! The total number of certificates earned between the date range of startDate and endDate for a user.
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
itemViewCount - Int This is a total number of items that a user has interacted with. (i.e. Taken a survey, assessment, watched a video, etc.)
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
presentationsViewCount - Int! The total number of presentations a user has viewed in Path beteween the date range of startDate and endDate.
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
createdAt - Date!
creditTypesForCreditsCertified - [CreditTypeForCreditCertified]!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
certificatesCount - Int!
creditTypesForCompletedValues - [CreditTypeForCompletedValue]!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
physician - Boolean
userMetadata - [UserMetadata!]! User metadata associated with this user
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 123,
  "accountId": 987,
  "admin": false,
  "assessmentPassedCount": 987,
  "assessmentFailedCount": 123,
  "completions": [Completion],
  "certificatesEarnedCount": 123,
  "itemViewCount": 987,
  "presentationsViewCount": 987,
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "creditTypesForCreditsCertified": [
    CreditTypeForCreditCertified
  ],
  "certificatesCount": 123,
  "creditTypesForCompletedValues": [
    CreditTypeForCompletedValue
  ],
  "physician": true,
  "userMetadata": [UserMetadata]
}
Types

UserCertificate

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
awardedAt - Date
certificate - Certificate
course - Course
user - CertificateUser
credits - [CreditsCertifiedValues]!
userId - Int
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "awardedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "certificate": Certificate,
  "course": Course,
  "user": CertificateUser,
  "credits": [CreditsCertifiedValues],
  "userId": 123
}
Types

UserCourseItemView

Fields
Field Name Description
completedAt - Date!
completedPercentage - Int!
courseSection - String!
credits - String
name - String!
type - String!
viewedAt - Date!
Example
{
  "completedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "completedPercentage": 123,
  "courseSection": "xyz789",
  "credits": "xyz789",
  "name": "abc123",
  "type": "xyz789",
  "viewedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

UserItem

Fields
Field Name Description
name - String!
id - ID!
itemType - String!
itemId - ID!
parentItemId - ID
parentItemType - String
progressPercentage - String
archivedAt - Date
userVisitsCount - Int!
visits - [ItemVisit!]!
externalCreditId - String
externalProductIds - [String]
Example
{
  "name": "xyz789",
  "id": 4,
  "itemType": "abc123",
  "itemId": "4",
  "parentItemId": 4,
  "parentItemType": "xyz789",
  "progressPercentage": "abc123",
  "archivedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "userVisitsCount": 123,
  "visits": [ItemVisit],
  "externalCreditId": "xyz789",
  "externalProductIds": ["abc123"]
}
Types

UserItemVisits

Fields
Field Name Description
userId - ID!
uid - String
userKey - String
userItems - [UserItem!]!
archivedAt - Date
firstName - String
lastName - String
email - String
username - String
language - String
countryCode - String
stateCode - String
timeZone - String
groups - [String]
Example
{
  "userId": 4,
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "xyz789",
  "userItems": [UserItem],
  "archivedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "abc123",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "groups": ["abc123"]
}
Types

UserMetadata

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! UserMetadata Id
accountId - ID! The Account Id for the account that owns this user metadata
userId - ID! The User Id this metadata belongs to
user - User! User this metadata belongs to
userMetadataTemplateId - ID! The User Metadata Template Id
userMetadataTemplate - UserMetadataTemplate! User Metadata Template
key - String! Metadata key
value - JSON! Metadata value as JSON
parentMetadataId - ID Parent metadata ID for hierarchical metadata
parentMetadata - UserMetadata Parent metadata for hierarchical metadata
childMetadata - [UserMetadata!]! Child metadata for hierarchical metadata
createdAt - Date! Date created
updatedAt - Date! Date updated
deletedAt - Date Date deleted (soft delete)
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 4,
  "userId": 4,
  "user": User,
  "userMetadataTemplateId": 4,
  "userMetadataTemplate": UserMetadataTemplate,
  "key": "xyz789",
  "value": {},
  "parentMetadataId": "4",
  "parentMetadata": UserMetadata,
  "childMetadata": [UserMetadata],
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "deletedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

UserMetadataTemplate

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! UserMetadataTemplate Id
accountId - ID! The Account Id for the account that owns this template
key - String! Template key
longKey - String! Template long key
question - String Template question text
valueType - String! Value type (string, integer, float, boolean, compound, date, datetime, list)
timezone - String Timezone for date/datetime value types
external - Boolean! Whether this is an external field
allowNullValues - Boolean! Whether null values are allowed
allowUserEditResponse - Boolean! Whether users can edit their responses
obfuscateSensitiveData - Boolean! Whether to obfuscate sensitive data
userMetadataValidatorId - ID User metadata validator ID
userMetadata - [UserMetadata!]! Associated user metadata records
createdAt - Date! Date created
updatedAt - Date! Date updated
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "accountId": "4",
  "key": "xyz789",
  "longKey": "abc123",
  "question": "abc123",
  "valueType": "abc123",
  "timezone": "abc123",
  "external": false,
  "allowNullValues": false,
  "allowUserEditResponse": true,
  "obfuscateSensitiveData": true,
  "userMetadataValidatorId": "4",
  "userMetadata": [UserMetadata],
  "createdAt": "2007-12-03",
  "updatedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

UserPresentation

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! The Presentation Id
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the Presentation
name - String! The Presentation name
userVisitsCount - Int! The number of visits to the Presentation by users with details within the StartDate - EndDate range. This excludes the users that are not allowed for the account
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
playCount - Int! The number of times the audio or video for the presenation was played
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
hoursWatched - Float! The total hours the audio or video for the presenation was played
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
progressPercentage - Float!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 987,
  "name": "xyz789",
  "userVisitsCount": 123,
  "playCount": 123,
  "hoursWatched": 987.65,
  "progressPercentage": 987.65
}
Types

UserPresentationReport

Fields
Field Name Description
userId - ID! The User Id
presentations - [UserPresentation]! The presentations associated with the user
Example
{
  "userId": "4",
  "presentations": [UserPresentation]
}
Types

UserSale

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
accountId - Int! The Account Id for the account that owns the User
ordersCount - Int! The total orders the user has
totalRefunded - Float! The total refunded to the user
revenue - Float! The revenue associated to the User's orders
creditsAdded - Float! The credits the User added
allCreditsIssued - Float! The total value of the credits issued by the User
creditsUsed - Float! The total value of the credits used by the User
creditsRemaining - Float! The credits remaining for the User
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 987,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "xyz789",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "abc123",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 123,
  "accountId": 123,
  "ordersCount": 987,
  "totalRefunded": 123.45,
  "revenue": 987.65,
  "creditsAdded": 987.65,
  "allCreditsIssued": 987.65,
  "creditsUsed": 123.45,
  "creditsRemaining": 123.45
}
Types

UserView

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID! A users database record id
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date The date a user created an account in Path, accepted a registration link or was imported into Path
teamId - Int The associated team Id if the user is a team member
itemViewCount - Int!
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
videoVisits - [VideoVisit]!
completedAt - Date!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "language": "abc123",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "xyz789",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "teamId": 987,
  "itemViewCount": 987,
  "videoVisits": [VideoVisit],
  "completedAt": "2007-12-03"
}
Types

VideoVisit

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
user - User!
playCount - Int!
hoursWatched - Float!
progressPercentage - Int!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "user": User,
  "playCount": 987,
  "hoursWatched": 987.65,
  "progressPercentage": 123
}
Types

Webinar

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
accountId - Int
teamId - Int
name - String
startDate - Date
startTime - String
registrationTotal - Int
maxRegistrations - Int
liveAttendeesTotal - Int
guestsTotal - Int
requireMinAttendance - Boolean
userVisitsTotal - Int
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
withArchived - Boolean
cancellationsTotal - Int
archiveViewersTotal - Int
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
archivePlayCount - Int
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
archiveHoursWatched - Float
Arguments
startDate - Date!
endDate - Date!
credits - [String]
provider - String
status - String
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "accountId": 987,
  "teamId": 123,
  "name": "abc123",
  "startDate": "2007-12-03",
  "startTime": "xyz789",
  "registrationTotal": 987,
  "maxRegistrations": 987,
  "liveAttendeesTotal": 123,
  "guestsTotal": 123,
  "requireMinAttendance": false,
  "userVisitsTotal": 987,
  "cancellationsTotal": 123,
  "archiveViewersTotal": 123,
  "archivePlayCount": 987,
  "archiveHoursWatched": 987.65,
  "credits": ["xyz789"],
  "provider": "abc123",
  "status": "abc123"
}
Types

WebinarArchiveViewerReport

Fields
Field Name Description
webinarId - ID! The Webinar Id
userViews - [WebinarArchiveViewerUser]! The user views associated with the webinar

{
  "webinarId": "4",
  "userViews": [WebinarArchiveViewerUser]

WebinarArchiveViewerUser

Fields
Field Name Description
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date!
playCount - Int!
hoursWatched - Float!
progressPercentage - Float!
Example
{
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "xyz789",
  "username": "xyz789",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "xyz789",
  "stateCode": "abc123",

  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",

  "hoursWatched": 123.45,
  "progressPercentage": 987.65
}

WebinarAttendee

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
registrationId - ID!
userId - Int! The userId field is the same as id, but easier to utilize for cross referencing in other systems
email - String! A users email as inputted in Path
username - String
firstName - String! A users first name as inputted in Path
lastName - String! A users last name as inputted in Path
language - String! The designated language for translations and text rendering in Path for a user.
countryCode - String The country a user designated in their Path profile
stateCode - String The state a user designated in their Path user profile
timeZone - String The timezone a user is in and is selected on the Path user profile.
firstLogin - Date When the user first signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastLogin - Date When the user last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
lastActive - Date When the user was last signed into their Path account. Activity dates and timestamps are shown in Pacific Time (US & Canada)
groups - [Group] This is a list of groups a user is designated to in on an account.
uid - String
userKey - String
customRegistrationQuestions - [SurveyQuestionAnswer]! If an account has custom login questions configured, these records are useful to show a users answers during the login process.
registrationDate - Date!
registrationUpdatedAt - Date
attendanceDuration - String!
timeNotViewed - String!
timeIn - Date!
timeOut - Date!
funnelStep - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "registrationId": 4,
  "userId": 123,
  "email": "abc123",
  "username": "abc123",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "language": "xyz789",
  "countryCode": "abc123",
  "stateCode": "abc123",
  "timeZone": "abc123",
  "firstLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastLogin": "2007-12-03",
  "lastActive": "2007-12-03",
  "groups": [Group],
  "uid": "xyz789",
  "userKey": "abc123",
  "customRegistrationQuestions": [SurveyQuestionAnswer],
  "registrationDate": "2007-12-03",
  "registrationUpdatedAt": "2007-12-03",
  "attendanceDuration": "abc123",
  "timeNotViewed": "abc123",
  "timeIn": "2007-12-03",
  "timeOut": "2007-12-03",
  "funnelStep": "xyz789"
}

WebinarLiveAttendeeReport

Fields
Field Name Description
webinarId - ID!
webinarName - String
webinarParentType - String
webinarParentId - ID
courseItemId - ID
startDate - Date
requiredAttendanceDuration - Int
actualEndTime - Date
externalCreditId - String
attendees - [WebinarAttendee]!
Example
{
  "webinarId": "4",
  "webinarName": "xyz789",
  "webinarParentType": "xyz789",
  "webinarParentId": "4",
  "courseItemId": "4",
  "startDate": "2007-12-03",
  "requiredAttendanceDuration": 123,
  "actualEndTime": "2007-12-03",
  "externalCreditId": "xyz789",
  "attendees": [WebinarAttendee]
}
Types

WebinarRegistrationReport

Fields
Field Name Description
webinarId - ID!
webinarName - String
webinarParentType - String
webinarParentId - ID
courseItemId - ID
startDate - Date
requiredAttendanceDuration - Int
actualEndTime - Date
externalCreditId - String
registrations - [WebinarAttendee]!
Example
{
  "webinarId": 4,
  "webinarName": "abc123",
  "webinarParentType": "abc123",
  "webinarParentId": "4",
  "courseItemId": 4,
  "startDate": "2007-12-03",
  "requiredAttendanceDuration": 987,
  "actualEndTime": "2007-12-03",
  "externalCreditId": "xyz789",
  "registrations": [WebinarAttendee]
}
